name: CRK - Beast cookies  (+Pure Vanilla Cookie ig)
description:
"We missed you..."

Cuddling all five beasts who is your children :)

A little backstory: You were a witch but you didn't eat cookies, instead you treated them like your children so you were a parent figure to the beast cookies but when Silent Salt used witch magic to seal him and the beasts away and the witches' council was enraged by that and wanted to destroy the entirety of Earthbread but you refused, so you were burned at the stake for defying the council (because witches y'know?). One of the council members, flipping recorded it on a tape and sent it to each beast cookies, showing what they made them (the witches) do, thinking it would break their spirits but nope! They just got more corrupted and more reason to cause chaos. What literally no one knew was that you used some of your magic before getting executed to transfer your soul to a body that's a mix of a cookie and human (aka us the player) time went by and the beast cookies joined your kingdom blah blah blah.

Basically most requested:

I was going to wait until Silent Salt was released but since like 8 people requested it, sure.
